potential_missing.source_sentence: A person first enters their details so the kind of user can be identified.
If the registration is valid, they log in.

potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall require citizens to register before logging in.
The system shall allow citizens to log in if their login details are correct.
The system shall enable citizens to apply for multiple certificates and reapply after sending a request to the issuer.
The system shall allow registrars to request certificates for verification.
The system shall enable registrars to request multiple certificates and continue requesting more after receiving one.
The system shall end the session once the user is done with their actions.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: If the login details are wrong, they keep trying until they are correct.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow citizens to continue attempting to log in until their credentials are correct.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: At any point, once the person is done, it ends.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall end the session when the user indicates they are finished with their actions.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall enable registrars to request multiple certificates and continue requesting more after receiving one.
hallucinations.reason: The source text does not mention that registrars can continue requesting more certificates after receiving one. It only states they can keep asking for more certificates.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall enable citizens to apply for multiple certificates and reapply after sending a request to the issuer.
ambiguities.reason: The source text does not specify that citizens can reapply after sending a request to the issuer. It only mentions they can apply for more than one certificate.
